arts.ttl: Chelsea star makes Mason Mount feelings clear after Man Utd star's heartfelt message
arts.sum: Mason Mount has endured a number of injury problems since joining Manchester United from Chelsea with his latest issue set to rule him out of Ruben Amorim's plans for several weeks

arts.ttl: Move to sign Everton player in January – Chance of exciting nee experience for Toffees man
arts.sum: Dominic Calvert-Lewin’s contract at Everton runs out at the end of this season and his future still needs to be clarified. The contract situation hasn’t impacted the striker’s game time this season as he’s made 15 league appearances, which includes 14 starts, managing two goals and an assist in the process. arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea 'handed major transfer boost' in pursuit of £33m teenage star
arts.sum: Juventus are reportedly prepared to sell Kenan Yildiz during the January transfer window, with Manchester United and Chelsea both interested in his services.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make Marcus Rashford loan decision' amid Arsenal, Chelsea speculation
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly willing to let Marcus Rashford leave on loan in January but will not sanction a move to a Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Chelsea tipped to sign superstar named 'best in the world'
arts.sum: The Blues reportedly don’t want to be “disrupted” by stars who are close to leaving the club on a Bosman deal, while they are eager to avoid similar situations to the ones that saw the aforementioned Mount and Gallagher depart Stamford Bridge. Chelsea's goalkeeping department is in need of an upgrade and now the Premier League club are being linked to a fresh name.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca opens door to three Chelsea January exits - and it's good news for Man Utd
arts.sum: Chelsea could trim their squad in the January transfer window with Enzo Maresca expecting players to ask to leave after not playing much football so far this season
